channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Health Minister Resigns, Calls for Leadership Challenge Against PM Starmer
item.description: Wes Streeting resigned as health minister and called for a leadership contest to oust Prime Minister Keir Starmer, accusing him of political drift. The move opens open rebellion within Labour as others position themselves to challenge the prime minister.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cuba Faces Worst Blackouts in Decades as US Fuel Blockade Starves Island
item.description: Protests erupted across Havana as Cuba confronts its worst rolling blackouts in decades. The energy minister said the island has completely run out of diesel fuel amid a U.S. blockade that has prevented fuel shipments from reaching the country.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Labour MP Resigns Seat to Clear Path for Burnham Leadership Challenge
item.description: British Labour lawmaker Josh Simons announced he would resign from parliament, a move designed to allow Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham to return to parliament and potentially challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer for the Labour leadership.

item.title: 💰 Sterling Drops as UK Political Crisis Engulfs Prime Minister Starmer
item.description: The pound fell against the dollar while UK government bonds held price gains as the political crisis escalated with the resignation of health minister Wes Streeting, increasing pressure on Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

item.title: 🌐 IMF Welcomes US-China Dialogue as 'Good for World Economy'
item.description: The International Monetary Fund welcomed the initial positive dialogue between Presidents Trump and Xi Jinping, saying that reduced tensions between the world's two largest economies would benefit the global economy amid ongoing trade and geopolitical uncertainties.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇮🇱 Activist flotilla departs Turkey for Gaza as Israel prepares for interception
item.description: Over 50 vessels carrying 500 activists left Turkey for Gaza, weeks after Israel intercepted a previous convoy. Israel is preparing to intercept the new flotilla amid ongoing tensions.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump-Xi meeting exposes gaps: China silent on Iran, US skips mentioning Taiwan
item.description: The high-stakes Trump-Xi summit in Beijing revealed diverging priorities as China remained quiet on Iran while the US avoided mentioning Taiwan publicly. Trade discussions took center stage.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky orders military response after Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 12
item.description: Russia launched its largest drone and missile barrage on Kyiv, killing at least 12 civilians. President Zelensky ordered an immediate military response as rescue operations continued.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany's Merz: Russia prefers escalation to negotiation
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz stated that Russia shows no interest in negotiations and prefers escalation, signaling continued tensions as the Ukraine war continues.

item.title: 🌍 Pope Leo decries European military spending as 'betrayal' of diplomacy
item.description: Pope Leo criticized rising European military spending, which grew by the highest amount since the Cold War amid US pressure, calling it a betrayal of diplomatic solutions to conflicts.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran war overshadows Trump's China visit as peace talks stall
item.description: The ongoing Iran conflict dominated Trump's visit to China as hopes for diplomatic resolution faded. A ship was reported seized near the UAE heading for Iranian waters.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran and UAE clash at BRICS foreign ministers meeting
item.description: Iran's foreign minister accused the UAE of direct involvement in military operations against Iran during a BRICS meeting in New Delhi, escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia attacks Ukraine for third day, Kyiv under massive assault
item.description: Russia unleashed its third consecutive day of massive drone and missile attacks on Ukraine, pounding Kyiv and other cities with hundreds of drones in what officials called the largest aerial assault over a two-day period.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump-Xi summit live updates: Iran war and trade dominate Beijing talks
item.description: President Trump met with Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing as the Iran war and trade tensions dominated discussions. Xi warned about Taiwan mishandling potentially leading to a 'dangerous place.'

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran economy nears collapse: Internet blackout, small businesses crushed by war inflation
item.description: Iran's economy is deteriorating rapidly as the war continues, with an internet blackout and inflation devastating small businesses as the conflict drags on.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cuba's power grid critical as US blocks fuel shipments
item.description: Cuba's aging power grid is failing as US sanctions prevent fuel shipments, plunging parts of the island into extended blackouts and sparking protests.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia floats non-aggression pact with Iran and regional states
item.description: Saudi Arabia has proposed a non-aggression pact involving Iran and other regional states as diplomatic efforts continue to find a resolution to the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸 AP: Iran war strain on US economy and global oil markets
item.description: The Iran conflict continues to strain US economic interests and global oil markets as the Strait of Hormuz remains a flashpoint for supply concerns.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump wants China's help on Iran, but Beijing may have other ideas
item.description: President Trump is seeking China's assistance in pressuring Iran, but Beijing's priorities and interests may not align with Washington's objectives as the summit unfolds.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump and Xi set for Beijing talks with trade truce and Iran war at stake
item.description: Trump and Xi prepared for high-stakes talks in Beijing covering trade relations and the Iran conflict, with both sides seeking to manage tensions in the critical bilateral relationship.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Xi warns Trump: Taiwan mishandling could lead to 'dangerous place'
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping warned President Trump that mishandling the Taiwan issue could push China-US relations to a 'dangerous place' as the two leaders met for their closely watched summit.

item.title: ⚔️ Russia's energy exports cushion blow from Iran war fallout
item.description: Despite sanctions, Russia is quietly cushioning global commodity markets from the full impact of the Iran war and Middle East energy export collapse.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine: Kyiv under massive Russian attack, mayor says
item.description: Kyiv faced its largest aerial assault since the war began as Russia pounded Ukraine with hundreds of drones and missiles over two days.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's economy collapsing under war strain as small businesses struggle
item.description: Iran's economy is deteriorating rapidly under war pressure, with an internet blackout and inflation devastating small businesses.

item.title: 💼 Tech layoffs continue: Cisco and LinkedIn cut thousands of jobs
item.description: Cisco and LinkedIn announced major layoffs as the technology sector continues to reduce workforce amid economic uncertainty.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey blocks flotilla to Gaza? Reports unclear
item.description: Conflicting reports emerged about Turkey's stance on the activist flotilla heading to Gaza as regional tensions continue.
